official_sources.authority_note: Official binary source for constructing the cooldown group Identifier fixture.
Official binary source for constructing the Play clientbound cooldown packet fixture.
Official binary source for the Play clientbound cooldown packet body codec.
Official binary source for the Play clientbound packet table and cooldown packet id.
Official binary source for Play clientbound cooldown framed packet encode and dispatch/decode.

field_notes.cooldown_group: Smallest one-character namespace and path Identifier fixture accepted by Identifier.parse(String) without initialized item registry or game state.

stop_boundary: Proves Play clientbound cooldown packet framing and dispatch/decode for one Identifier cooldown-group and duration fixture only; do not infer item cooldown semantics, item registry contents, UI cooldown behavior, runtime Play entry, world load, spawn readiness, render readiness, or client-load completion.
